title: [CI:DOCS] Update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.56.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | minor | `1.55.2` -> `1.56.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>golangci/golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint)</summary>

### [`v1.56.0`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases/tag/v1.56.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v1.55.2...v1.56.0)

golangci-lint is a free and open-source project, built by people in their free time.
Also, the [linter authors](https://golangci-lint.run/product/thanks/) are an important part of golangci-lint.
If you use and appreciate golangci-lint please think to support us (golangci-lint maintainers and linters authors). :heart:

#### Changelog

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - At any time (no schedule defined), Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).

🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied.

♻ **Rebasing**: Whenever PR is behind base branch, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox.

🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again.
